zh.East Ansley, South Molton, Devon, Englan: 英國戴文素斯 莫爾頓
zh.Cruwys Morchard, Devonshire, Englannd: 英國戴文可盧斯 莫爾哈德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cruwys於大約1270年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Sir Robert de Cruwys42歲，母親Matilda Fitz Payne24歲。他和Agnes Cruse至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1339年之後在英國英格蘭戴文。

zh-hans.East Ansley, South Molton, Devon, Englan: 英国戴文素斯 莫爾頓
zh-hans.Cruwys Morchard, Devonshire, Englannd: 英国戴文可盧斯 莫爾哈德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cruwys于大约1270年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Cruwys42岁，母亲Matilda Fitz Payne24岁。他和Agnes Cruse至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1339年之后在英国英格兰戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Cruwys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cruse
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name probably from an unidentified place in Normandy named with Old French crues, crus, creus ‘hollow’. Creuse (in Somme, Picardy) and Cruys-Straëte (formerly in Flanders, now in the French département of Nord), which have the same etymology, are alternative possibilities but seem less likely on geographical and tenurial grounds.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English crus(e) ‘bold, fierce’, although the regular development would be to Crowse (rhyming with house).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Cruwys was born about 1270, in Devon, England, his father, Sir Robert de Cruwys, was 42 and his mother, Matilda Fitz Payne, was 24. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Agnes Cruse. He died after 1339, in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cruwys est né environ 1270, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Cruwys, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Matilda Fitz Payne, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes Cruse. Il est décédé après 1339, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Cruwys um 1270 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Cruwys 42 und seine Mutter Matilda Fitz Payne 24. Er hatte mit Agnes Cruse mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1339 in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Cruwys è nato il circa 1270 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Cruwys, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Fitz Payne, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Agnes Cruse. Morì dopo il 1339, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Anstic Crues, Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボン

ja.lifeSummary: John Cruwysが約1270年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Cruwysは42歳，母Matilda Fitz Payneは24歳であった。彼はAgnes Cruseとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1339年以後にイギリスイギリスデボンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cruwys(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Cruwys(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Fitz Payne(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Agnes Cruse(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1339년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cruwys nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Cruwys, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Fitz Payne, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Agnes Cruse. Ele faleceu após 1339, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cruwys родился около 1270 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Cruwys было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Fitz Payne, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Agnes Cruse. Он умер после 1339 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1270–after 1339: e tusa o le 1270–ina ua ma'ea le 1339

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Cruwys nació aproximadamente 1270, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Cruwys, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Matilda Fitz Payne, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Agnes Cruse. Murió después de 1339, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
